social.description: Optional in-tree feishu-social extension. Adds group-context injection into the agent's system prompt, a sender-name registry consulted as a last-resort name resolver, and a storm-guard that protects against bot-to-bot reply loops. Disabled by default — set `enabled: true` to activate.

enabled.description: Master switch. When false (default), no hooks register and the registry stays unloaded — clean install behaves exactly like upstream openclaw-lark.

adminDisplayName.description: Display name substituted into the {adminName} placeholder in the context template. Default 'the admin'.

contextTemplate.description: Optional override for the system-prompt context block. When unset, a neutral default is used. See examples/social-context-templates/ for shipped variants. Supports placeholders: {time}, {count}, {timeline}, {members}, {groupBots}, {botCount}, {adminName}.

contextGroups.description: List of oc_* chat IDs where group context is injected. Empty list = extension is loaded but injects no context (sender-name lookup still works).

contextMessageCount.description: How many recent messages to fetch per group context build (5-100). Default 20.

contextCacheTtlMs.description: TTL for the per-chat context cache, in ms. Default 60000.

stormThreshold.description: Bot-inbound @-mention count within stormWindowMs that trips the storm debounce. Default 5.

stormWindowMs.description: Window in ms used for the bot-inbound storm threshold. Default 30000.

circuitBreakerMaxOutbound.description: Outbound count within circuitWindowMs that opens the circuit. Default 5.

circuitWindowMs.description: Window in ms used for the outbound circuit-breaker count. Default 60000.

circuitBreakerSilenceMs.description: How long the circuit stays open once tripped, in ms. Default 300000 (5 min).

alertReceiverOpenId.description: Admin open_id that receives a DM when storm-debounce fires. When unset, no DM is sent (storm guard still drops bot inbound).

botOverrides.description: User-supplied bot metadata overrides keyed by agentId, merged on top of wiki-bots.json entries.

debugLog.description: Enable verbose extension log file. Path determined by logDir. Default true.

logDir.description: Directory for the extension log file. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/feishu-social/logs/.

wikiBotsPath.description: Path to a user-supplied wiki-bots.json (member + bot registry). Defaults to ~/.openclaw/feishu-social/wiki-bots.json. Schema documented in examples/wiki-bots.example.json.

spinnerPhrases.description: Phrases shown alongside the loading spinner during the pre-answer streaming phase. One is picked at random per turn. Empty or unset → 'Processing...'.

typingEmoji.description: Reaction emoji used as a typing cue. Single emoji name (e.g. 'Get') or comma-separated pool (e.g. 'Get,DONE,JIAYI'). One is picked at random per turn. Default 'Get'.

replyInThread.description: Force agent replies into a Lark thread for groups. true | 'enabled' enables. Per-group override available via groups[chatId].replyInThread.

allowBots.description: Bot-sender admission policy. true = allow all bots; false = block; 'mentions' = groups require an @-mention of this bot, DMs pass. Default 'mentions'. Per-group override via groups[chatId].allowBots.

threadSession.description: When true, each Lark thread maintains its own agent session, distinct from the parent chat's session.

groups.description: Per-group overrides keyed by oc_<chatid>. The wildcard key '*' applies to all groups (including those not explicitly listed). Per-group keys override account-level defaults.

enabled.description: Disable this group entirely when false.
